job.queued: Import started — you'll get a notification when it finishes.

pick.hint: A .zip exported from Initiative's guild or initiative backup.
pick.notZip: This file isn't a valid Initiative backup.
pick.tooLarge: This file is larger than the {{limit}} upload limit.

peek.note: Nothing is uploaded yet — review and continue to upload.

plan.willCreate: "{{name}}" will be imported as a new initiative "{{proposed}}"
plan.skipped_one: {{count}} item was left out of this backup by its exporter
plan.skipped_other: {{count}} items were left out of this backup by its exporter
plan.unknownTypes: Unknown content types will be skipped: {{types}}
plan.note: Each initiative in the backup is created fresh — nothing existing is changed. The import runs in the background.

progress.title: Importing…
progress.note: This can take a while. You can close this dialog — you'll get a notification, and the report stays available in guild settings.

report.title: Import finished
report.unmatchedEmails: Some people couldn't be matched by email: {{emails}}

envelope.title: Import from file
envelope.description: Import a JSON file exported from Initiative. The file's contents are created in the initiative you choose.
envelope.parseError: This file isn't a recognized Initiative export.
envelope.wrongTool: This file is a {{type}} export — import it from that tool's page.
envelope.fileTooLarge: This file is too large to import.
envelope.queued: Import started — you'll get a notification when it finishes.
envelope.warningUnmatched_one: {{count}} person couldn't be matched by email: {{emails}}
envelope.warningUnmatched_other: {{count}} people couldn't be matched by email: {{emails}}

dataTab.importDescription: Restore an initiative or guild backup zip. Each backed-up initiative is created as a new initiative — nothing existing is changed.
